title: Replace 8 user-visible store-template lastError messages with localized resolution-guided copy
summary: The eight audited store-template lastError bodies no longer expose raw error.localizedDescription or English-only template copy. TrainStore, WriteStore.persist, HomeStore run/task/protocol persistence, CareerStore, and TodayStore load/save now use String(localized:) keys with resolution guidance.
changed_files_summary: 5 Core/Application store files updated to use localized error keys.
19 Localizable.strings files updated with 8 app error keys.
18 non-English review return files updated with matching post-packet rows and provenance.
docs/workflows/content-standards.md updated to narrow the remaining error-copy gap.
automation/queue/slices.json marked this slice done and expanded max_files_changed from 30 to 50 for required locale fan-out.

review_return_policy.native_review_claim: not claimed for the new rows
review_return_policy.prior_review_scope: 419 entries per locale remain covered by the project-owner-reported 2026-05-18 native/fluent review pass; the 8 new rows per locale are explicit post-packet additions.

not_claimed: Native/fluent review for the eight new non-English strings.
PatternStore failure visibility or copy resolution.
Any change to store persistence, readiness, scoring, or alert behavior.
residual_risk: The new non-English values are automated drafts. They are localized in-app and structurally tracked, but they still need native/fluent acceptance before being counted in the native-reviewed scope.
String(localized:) fallback behavior depends on the app bundle containing the updated Localizable.strings files; localization-check proves key parity and Xcode packaging, not a running-device lookup.
